name: PR Media Outreach Planner
description: PR Media Outreach Planner - Marketing template for channels professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS PLANNER Step 1: Build Your Media List Start with the Media Contacts tab. Add journalists, editors, bloggers, podcasters, and influencers relevant to your industry. Include their beat, outlet, and preferred contact method. Quality over quantity. Step 2: Develop Story Angles Go to Story Angles to brainstorm and refine newsworthy angles. Every pitch needs a story, not just a product announcement. Think about what makes your news relevant to the journalist's audience.
